title: An Investigational Study to Evaluate Experimental Medication BMS-986165 Compared to Placebo in Participants With Plaque Psoriasis (POETYK-PSO-3) in Mainland China, Taiwan, and South Korea

eligibility.text: Plaque psoriasis for at least 6 months
eligibility.justification: This criterion helps ensure a sufficient sample size to detect treatment effects.
This criterion ensures the study population is representative of patients with moderate to severe psoriasis, maximizing the likelihood of detecting a treatment effect.

eligibility.text: Candidate for phototherapy or systemic therapy
eligibility.justification: This criterion helps ensure that participants are eligible for potential treatments and can be followed up with appropriate care.
This criterion may serve to exclude patients with other types of skin conditions, potentially reducing the risk of confounding factors in the study.
This criterion helps ensure patient safety by excluding individuals who may be more susceptible to infections during treatment.
This criterion ensures that participants are not already receiving the drug, potentially mitigating for potential adverse effects or interactions.
This criterion acknowledges that additional factors might influence eligibility and feasibility of the study.
